resources.name: Rage
resources.description: Enter a fierce rage for extra damage and resistance. While raging, you deal extra damage and have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

resources.name: Bardic Inspiration
resources.description: Inspire an ally with a bonus die they can add to an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within the next 10 minutes.

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 1st-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 1st level or higher.

resources.name: 2nd Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 2nd-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 2nd level or higher, or upcast a lower-level spell for greater effect.

resources.name: Channel Divinity
resources.description: Channel divine energy to fuel a powerful class feature granted by your deity or sacred oath.

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 1st-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 1st level or higher.

resources.name: 2nd Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 2nd-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 2nd level or higher, or upcast a lower-level spell for greater effect.

resources.name: Wild Shape
resources.description: Transform into a beast you have seen before. You assume the beast's hit points and physical abilities while retaining your mental stats.

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 1st-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 1st level or higher.

resources.name: 2nd Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 2nd-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 2nd level or higher, or upcast a lower-level spell for greater effect.

resources.name: Second Wind
resources.description: Use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. A quick burst of stamina in the heat of battle.

resources.name: Discipline Points
resources.description: Fuel your martial techniques with inner discipline. Spend points to perform Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, or Step of the Wind.

resources.name: Lay on Hands
resources.description: Touch a creature to restore hit points from your healing pool, or spend 5 points to cure one disease or neutralize one poison.

resources.name: Channel Divinity
resources.description: Channel divine energy to fuel a powerful class feature granted by your deity or sacred oath.

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 1st-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 1st level or higher.

resources.name: 2nd Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 2nd-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 2nd level or higher, or upcast a lower-level spell for greater effect.

resources.name: Hunter's Mark
resources.description: Cast Hunter's Mark once without expending a spell slot. Mark a creature to deal extra 1d6 damage on each hit and track it more easily.

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 1st-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 1st level or higher.

resources.name: 2nd Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 2nd-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 2nd level or higher, or upcast a lower-level spell for greater effect.

resources.name: Sorcery Points
resources.description: Tap into your innate magical power to create spell slots or fuel Metamagic options that modify your spells.

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 1st-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 1st level or higher.

resources.name: 2nd Level Spell Slots
resources.description: Expend a 2nd-level spell slot to cast a prepared spell of 2nd level or higher, or upcast a lower-level spell for greater effect.

resources.name: Pact Magic Slots
resources.description: Warlock spell slots that recharge on a short rest. All slots are the same level and can be used to cast any warlock spell you know.

resources.name: Arcane Recovery
resources.description: During a short rest, recover expended spell slots with a combined level equal to half your wizard level (rounded up).

resources.name: 1st Level Spell Slots
